### power_bloc (20)

- `power_bloc_allow_foreign_investment_lower_rank_bool` — **Foreign Investment Rights in Power Bloc Member with lower Rank** — Countries within the same Power Bloc have Foreign Investment Rights in Power Bloc Member with lower Rank
- `power_bloc_allow_port_access_bool` — **Allows port access between Power Bloc members** — Gives Power Bloc members access to ports within the Bloc, even if they don't have Military Access
- `power_bloc_allow_wider_migration_area_bool` — **Allow Migration within a Power Bloc** — Allows Migration to potentially also happen between members of a Power Bloc that don't share a Market, rather than only within a Country’s Market
- `power_bloc_cohesion_add` — **Power Bloc Cohesion** — An increase or decrease to the Cohesion of a Power Bloc
- `power_bloc_cohesion_mult` — **Power Bloc Cohesion** — An increase or decrease to the Cohesion of a Power Bloc
- `power_bloc_cohesion_per_member_add` — **Power Bloc Cohesion per Power Bloc Member** — An increase or decrease to the Cohesion of a Power Bloc for every Power Bloc Member it has other than the Power Bloc Leader
- `power_bloc_customs_union_bool` — **Customs Union** — All members of the Power Bloc become part of the same Customs Union permanently
- `power_bloc_disallow_embargo_bool` — **Cannot place Embargo on another Power Bloc member** — Cannot place Embargo on another Power Bloc member
- `power_bloc_disallow_war_bool` — **Cannot start or join wars amongst Power Bloc members** — Cannot start or join wars amongst Power Bloc members
- `power_bloc_income_transfer_to_leader_factor` — **Income Transfer to Power Bloc Leader** — Base percentage of tax income transferred from Power Bloc Members to the Power Bloc Leader
- `power_bloc_invite_acceptance_add` — **Power Bloc Invitation Acceptance Chance** — A bonus or penalty to the acceptance chance of a Power Bloc invitation
- `power_bloc_leader_can_add_wargoal_bool` — **Allows free War Goal** — The Power Bloc Leader may add a War Goal of their own even when voluntarily supporting another Power Bloc Member
- `power_bloc_leader_can_force_state_religion_bool` — **Allows Impose State Religion** — The Power Bloc Leader may impose a change of State Religion on a Power Bloc Member whose faith differs from their own
- `power_bloc_leader_can_make_subjects_bool` — **Can Subjugate Power Bloc Member** — The Power Bloc Leader can use a Bloc Member Action to turn independent Power Bloc Members into Subjects
- `power_bloc_leader_can_regime_change_bool` — **Allows Force Regime Change** — The Power Bloc Leader may execute a Regime Change on a Power Bloc Member that deviates from their ideology
- `power_bloc_leader_can_spread_culture_to_pb_bool` — **Allows Spread Primary Culture in Power Bloc Members** — Adds the largest Primary Culture of the Power Bloc Leader to a Power Bloc Member
- `power_bloc_leverage_generation_mult` — **Leverage Generation** — An increase or decrease to the Leverage a Power Bloc generates on all Countries.
- `power_bloc_mandate_progress_mult` — **Weekly Mandate Progress** — An increase or decrease to the weekly Mandate progress for a Power Bloc.
- `power_bloc_target_sway_cost_mult` — **Sway Maneuver cost for the Diplomatic Play Target** — An increase or decrease to the Sway Maneuver cost for the Diplomatic Play Target
- `power_bloc_trade_advantage_add` — **Trade Advantage within Power Bloc** — An increase or decrease in overall Trade Advantage with Countries in the same Power Bloc

- `state_allow_assimilation_without_presence_bool` — **Assimilation to Primary Culture Always Allowed** — Assimilation to Primary Culture is allowed even if no Pops of that Culture are present in the State

- `state_trade_advantage_same_religion_add` — **Trade Advantage with Co-Religionists** — An increase or decrease in overall Trade Advantage with Countries of the same State Religion
- `state_trade_capacity_add` — **Trade Capacity** — An increase or decrease to the Trade Capacity of a State.
- `state_trade_capacity_mult` — **Trade Capacity** — Trade Capacity
- `state_trade_center_max_limit_add` — **Trade Center Max Level** — A bonus or penalty to the maximum level of Trade Center buildings.
- `state_trade_quantity_mult` — **Traded Quantity** — An increase or decrease to the quantity of Goods traded for each Trade Capacity.
- `state_turmoil_effects_mult` — **State Penalties from Turmoil** — An increase or decrease of the negative effects Pop Turmoil has on the State they live in
- `state_unincorporated_starting_wages_mult` — **Starting Wages in Unincorporated States** — How much more or less Pops in Unincorporated States get as initial salaries.
- `state_upper_strata_expected_sol_add` — **Minimum Expected Standard of Living for the Upper Strata** — An increase or decrease to the minimum Standard of Living that Upper Strata Pops expect to enjoy
- `state_upper_strata_standard_of_living_add` — **Standard of Living for the Upper Strata** — Extra Standard of Living added on top of wealth
- `state_urbanization_per_level_add` — **Urbanization per Urban Center** — The amount of Urbanization required in a State to create 1 level of Urban Center
- `state_urbanization_per_level_mult` — **Urbanization per Urban Center** — Urbanization per Urban Center
- `state_violence_against_minorities_bool` — **Violence Against Minorities**
- `state_war_support_monthly_add` — **Monthly [concept_war_support]**
- `state_weekly_trades_add` — **Weekly Trades** — An increase or decrease to number of adjustments to Trade that a State can make each week.
- `state_welfare_payments_add` — **Welfare Payments** — The fraction of the Normal Wage at which Pops receive Welfare Payments from the state
- `state_welfare_payments_mult` — **Welfare Payments Multiplier** — The total sum of all Welfare Payments in the State are multiplied by this value
- `state_working_adult_ratio_add` — **Workforce Ratio** — The ratio of Workforce to Dependents
- `state_yearly_cultural_acceptance_add` — **Annual Cultural Acceptance**
- `state_yi_standard_of_living_add` — **[concept_sol] Modifier for Yi** — A bonus or penalty to a specific culture's [concept_sol]

### tax (6)

- `tax_consumption_add` — **Consumption Tax Rate** — The rate at which goods that have a Consumption Tax placed on them are taxed
- `tax_dividends_add` — **Dividends Tax Rate** — Dividends Tax Rate
- `tax_heathen_add` — **Religious Tax** — The amount of Heathen Taxes collected from Pops each year for following a Religion that is having low Acceptance
- `tax_income_add` — **Income Tax Rate** — The portion of their Wages that Pops must pay in taxes
- `tax_land_add` — **Land Tax** — The amount of Land Taxes collected from peasants! Peasants
- `tax_per_capita_add` — **Per Capita Tax** — The amount of Per Capita Taxes collected from non-peasants! Peasants Pops
